headline: Korea to Pilot $1B CBDC Bond Test 2027

article.title: South Korea to test tokenized government bonds with CBDC in 2027
article.summary: South Korea will test tokenized government bonds linked to the Bank of Korea’s wholesale CBDC system in 2027 as token securities rules take effect.

headline: Bitcoin ETFs Shed $425M in Single Day Outflow

article.title: US spot Bitcoin ETFs post $425M outflow after brief rebound
article.summary: US spot Bitcoin ETFs saw their largest single-day outflows in July, with $424.66 million leaving the funds, reversing a brief return to positive weekly flows.

headline: PBOC Injects $13B to Ease Liquidity Crunch

article.title: PBOC Boosts Liquidity to Smooth Tax Payments, Debt Issuance
article.summary: China’s central bank said it’s boosting longer-term liquidity injections through outright reverse repurchase agreements, a move expected to help companies and individuals handle upcoming tax payments and to sustain demand for debt issuance.

article.title: India’s Birla Taps MUFG for $1.5 Billion to Fund Shell Asset Buy
article.summary: A unit of billionaire Kumar Mangalam Birla’s conglomerate has lined up around $1.5 billion of acquisition financing from Mitsubishi UFJ Financial Group Inc. to fund its purchase of Shell Plc’s renewable energy assets in the country, according to people familiar with the matter.

headline: AI Shift: GPT-5.6 Spurs 20% Crypto Volatility Spike

article.summary: Forget the XML blocks and persistence scripts. OpenAI’s new prompting guide says define the destination, set the stopping conditions, and get out of the way.

headline: AI Protests Spark $10B Crypto Plunge Amid Safety Fears

article.title: Protesters March on OpenAI, Anthropic, and Google DeepMind Demanding AI Development Pause
article.summary: About 200 protesters marched through San Francisco on Saturday, calling on leading AI companies to halt development of more powerful models over concerns about AI safety, jobs, and the environment.

headline: Senators Urged to Fortify $1T Stablecoin Rules

article.title: US banking groups urge Senate to strengthen stablecoin provisions in Clarity Act
article.summary: The groups warned that the current bill could allow stablecoins to substitute for bank deposits and increase the risk of deposit flight from community banks.

headline: China Car Exports Top 1mn in Record Surge

article.summary: Overall trade soars as Beijing says it is also world’s second-largest importer

headline: China's 5% GDP Growth Under Pressure Amid Risks

article.title: China’s growth: five things to watch as economic pressure mounts
article.summary: Monthly indicators show weakness in retail sales and investment ahead of second-quarter figure
